name: mojo-test-file-adr009-split
description: Split Mojo test files exceeding ADR-009 limit (10 fn test_ per file) to prevent heap corruption in Mojo v0.26.1. Use when: (1) a .mojo test file has more than 10 fn test_ functions, (2) CI fails non-deterministically with libKGENCompilerRTShared.so JIT fault, (3) heap corruption is suspected due to high test load in Mojo v0.26.1.
